items.description: Downed tree on I-76 eastbound between 2.7 miles east of Exit 331B: I-476 NORTH - PLYMOUTH MEETING and 3 miles east of Exit 331B: I-476 NORTH - PLYMOUTH MEETING. There is a lane restriction.
